property_description: The caster selects a willing creature, and destroys one blessing that creature is currently subjected to. This may include empowered blessings, which destroys the blessing, but has no effect on the boon empowering it.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 1 Blessing. While this blessing is empowered, all its empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or the blessing's effect is suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 2 Blessings. While these blessings are empowered, all their empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or their effects are suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 3 Blessings. While these blessings are empowered, all their empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or their effects are suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.
The user gains 5 health as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Fortitude blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains 10 health as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Fortitude blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains 15 health as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Fortitude blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user increases the base damage they deal with weapons by 1 as long as the blessing persists. This damage is doubled as normal if a weapon is wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Ferocity blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user increases the base damage they deal with weapons by 2 as long as the blessing persists. This damage is doubled as normal if a weapon is wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Ferocity blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user increases the base damage they deal with weapons by 3 as long as the blessing persists. This damage is doubled as normal if a weapon is wielded in two hands.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Ferocity blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains 10 bonus armor as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Toughness blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains 20 bonus armor as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Toughness blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains 30 bonus armor as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Toughness blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user chooses one of the following conditions: Fear, Immobilize, Push, Sleep, or Wither. The user gains the ability to resist that effect once per day as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Resistance blessing affects a bound user for a specific condition. Users may have multiple Resistance blessings so long as they all resist different conditions.

property_description: The user chooses one of the following conditions: Charm, Hemorrhage, Silence, or Slow. The user gains the ability to resist that effect once per day as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Resistance blessing affects a bound user for a specific condition. Users may have multiple Resistance blessings so long as they all resist different conditions.

property_description: The user chooses one of the following conditions: Blight, Paralyze, or Waste. The user gains the ability to resist that effect once per day as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Resistance blessing affects a bound user for a specific condition. Users may have multiple Resistance blessings so long as they all resist different conditions.

property_description: The user both gains 5 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 1 during daylight. During the evenings, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1). All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Sun affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Moon.

property_description: The user both gains 10 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 2 during daylight. During the evenings, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1). All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Sun affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Moon.

property_description: The user both gains 15 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 3 during daylight. They may additionally throw one "Counter All" packet during daylight. During the evenings, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1), and for the first encounter they participate in each evening, their weapon and ability damage is reduced by half. All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Sun affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Moon.

property_description: The user both gains 5 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 1 during the evening. During daylight, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1). All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Moon affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Sun.

property_description: The user both gains 10 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 2 during the evening. During daylight, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1). All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Moon affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Sun.

property_description: The user both gains 15 bonus health and increases their base weapon damage by 3 during the evening. They may additionally grant themselves "Insubstantial 30" at night, once per day. During daylight, the user suffers a -5 penalty to their maximum health (minimum 1), and for the first encounter they participate in each day, their weapon and ability damage is reduced by half. All of these bonuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Moon affects a bound user. May not bind to any Blessing of the Sun.

property_description: For each unique item curse the user is currently bound to, once per day they may call "Blight 10"  on a successful weapon strike or packet throw. These may be delivered as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Pennance blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: For each unique item curse the user is currently bound to, once per day they may call either "Blight 20", or "10 Drain" on a successful weapon strike or packet throw. These may be delivered as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Pennance blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: For each unique item curse the user is currently bound to, once per day they may call either "Blight 30", "15 Drain", or "Paralyze 3"  on a successful weapon strike or packet throw. These may be delivered as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Pennance blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: While the user possesses guardians, they may use their own Tier 1 abilities and Expertise features. The user suffers a -10 penalty to their Health (minimum 1). Both features last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Transformed affects a bound user and guardian.

property_description: While the user possesses guardians, they may use their own Tier 1 and Tier 2 abilities and Expertise features. The user suffers a -20 penalty to their Health (minimum 1).
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Transformed affects a bound user and guardian.

property_description: While the user possesses guardians, they may use their own Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 abilities and Expertise features. The user suffers a -30 penalty to their Health (minimum 1). Both features last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Transformed affects a bound user and guardian.

property_description: While the blessing persists, if the user has empty bind slots, they gain a +1 to damage, +5 to health, and a +5 to armor for every three empty bind slots. twice per day, the user may call counter to any spell effect that strikes them within Reach.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Unchained affects a bound user.

property_description: While the blessing persists, if the user has empty bind slots, they gain a +1 to damage, +5 to health, and a +5 to armor for every two empty bind slots. Twice per day, the user may call counter to any spell effect that strikes them within Reach. Twice per day, the user may call "Counter All" with a successful weapon strike.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Unchained affects a bound user.

property_description: While the blessing persists, if the user has empty bind slots, they gain a +1 to damage, +5 to health, and a +5 to armor for every empty bind slot. Twice per day, the user may call Counter to any spell effect that strikes them within Reach. Twice per day, the user may call "Counter All" with a successful weapon strike. The user is Resilient to all damage dealt by a Spell.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Unchained affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains Resilience to their choice of {element}.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Elements affects a bound user for a specific element. Users may have two Blessings of Elements, which must never be inversions of one another. Element must be chosen at time of casting.

property_description: The user gains immunity to {element} and vulnerability to {inverse element}.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Elements affects a bound user for a specific element. Users may have two Blessings of Elements, which must never be inversions of one another. Element must be chosen at time of casting.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to {Inverse element}. Any time the user would take damage from {element} with a source of Skill, Spell, or Shout, they instead are healed for half the value of that damage, ignoring their armor. The user is immune to any damage of the chosen element that has no source.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of the Elements affects a bound user for a specific element. Users may have two Blessings of Elements, which must never be inversions of one another. Element must be chosen at time of casting.

property_description: The user gains a bonus to each pool of magical energy they possess so long as this blessing persists. +5 to Lay on Hands, +10 to Magic Missile, and +20 to Elemental Blast. This bonus refills any time a pool normally would.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Endowment blessing affects a bound user for a specific pool. Users may have multiple Endowment blessings so long as they are all for different pools.

property_description: The user gains a bonus to each pool of magical energy they possess so long as this blessing persists. +10 to Lay on Hands, +20 to Magic Missile, and +40 to Elemental Blast. This bonus refills any time a pool normally would.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Endowment blessing affects a bound user for a specific pool. Users may have multiple Endowment blessings so long as they are all for different pools.

property_description: The user gains a bonus to each pool of magical energy they possess so long as this blessing persists. +15 to Lay on Hands, +30 to Magic Missile, and +60 to Elemental Blast. This bonus refills any time a pool normally would.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Endowment blessing affects a bound user for a specific pool. Users may have multiple Endowment blessings so long as they are all for different pools.

property_description: The user of this Blessing gains 1 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description: The user of this Blessing gains 2 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description: The user of this Blessing gains 3 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a ten second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 5 or Harm 5 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a five second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 10 or Harm 10 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting. When this blessing is empowered by a boon,
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a five second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 15 or Harm 15 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains an 5 Bonus Armor (Ignoring their armor cap) and Bonus Health for each essence they are missing below the maximum of 5, as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user deals an additional 5 damage with all harmful abilities they use, and this damage is doubled if the ability uses the weapon damage of a weapon wielded in two hands. These benefits last as long as the blessing persists.  When this blessing is empowered by a Boon
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user gains the ability to call "Immobilize 5" on a successful weapon strike or packet throw twice each encounter. This benefit lasts as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: If the user is able to touch another character with this blessing within five seconds of the start of an encounter, those characters become "Battle Buddies." Both may use a single non-passive ability of Tier 5 or lower during that encounter without expending it's normal usage, so long as that ability targets their Battle Buddy, or a creature their ally is engaged in combat with. Additionally, either Battle Buddy may complete a 10 second "aid" count to call "1 Heal" or "1 Harm" on their unconscious Battle Buddy.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user may double the effect of any beneficial Healing or Harm damage they take as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user gains the ability to Touch an ally and, after completing a five second "Lay on Hands" count, they may call "Spell Life" or "Spell Death," depending on which is beneficial to the target. Each use of this ability consumes twenty five points from the user's Lay on Hands pool. This effect last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique. User must have at least 25 points of Lay on Hands pool.

property_description: The user may double the damage of their healing and harm effects when they are used to help an ally on touch casting. This benefit lasts as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: When using their shield, the user is immune to Fear, Immobilize, Push.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: If the user is living, they gain the Unliving condition, or if the user is Unliving, they lose the Unliving condition. Both statuses last as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user succeeds on all salvaging attempts on a dice roll of 3+ rather than 4+, as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user must choose one crafting profession in which they have at least one level. Whenever they craft using that profession, they require one less common component to perform the ritual per success the ritual requires, as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user must choose one crafting profession in which they have at least one level. Whenever they craft using that profession, they require two less common component to perform the ritual per success the ritual requires, as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user must choose one Pillar in which they have purchased the Mastery ability. If that Mastery Ability has an activated ability, they may use it one additional time per-day or per-encounter depending as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Users may have multiple Mastery blessings so long as they are all for different Mastery Abilities.

property_description: The user chooses at the time of casting one damage type from Acid, Ice, Fire, or Shock. So long as the blessing persists the user must call this damage type instead of Damage and may call it  instead of Pierce.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +1 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 5 Temporary Health.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +2 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 10 Temporary Health.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +3 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 15 Temporary Health.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, they take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 5 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than one. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, They take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 15 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than three. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, They take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 25 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than five. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.

property_description:
The caster selects a willing creature, and destroys one blessing that creature is currently subjected to. This may include empowered blessings, which destroys the blessing, but has no effect on the boon empowering it.

Upcasted: The destroyed blessing randomly rewards one component of the ones required to cast it in its unmutated form.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 2 Blessings. While these blessings are empowered, all their empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or their effects are suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 3 Blessings. While these blessings are empowered, all their empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or their effects are suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.

A mighty patron, chosen when the boon is bestowed, extends the duration of up to 4 Blessings. While these blessings are empowered, all their empowerment text becomes active, and must be obeyed, or their effects are suppressed. Blessings that are empowered no longer consume a Guardian Slot, and instead are considered part of this Boon. At any time, a player may unbind from this boon, immediately destroying all empowered blessings and the boon itself.

property_limitations: Only the most powerful Endowment blessing affects a bound user for a specific pool. Users may have multiple Endowment blessings so long as they are all for different pools.

property_description: The user gains a bonus to each pool of magical energy they possess so long as this blessing persists. +20 to Lay on Hands, +40 to Magic Missile, and +80 to Elemental Blast. This bonus refills any time a pool normally would.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Endowment blessing affects a bound user for a specific pool. Users may have multiple Endowment blessings so long as they are all for different pools.

property_description:
The user of this Blessing gains 1 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.

Upcast: The user instead decides the component they receive.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description:
The user of this Blessing gains 2 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.

Upcast: The user instead decides the component they receive.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description:
The user of this Blessing gains 3 common component upon completion of any quest provided by an NPC. The component is of the NPC's choice.

Upcast: The user instead decides the component they receive.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Blessing of Greed affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a five second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 5 or Harm 5 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a five second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 10 or Harm 10 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting. When this blessing is empowered by a boon,
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description: The user gains vulnerability to both Fire and Acid damage, but upon completing a five second "regenerating" count, may call Heal 15 or Harm 15 on themselves. This count is interrupted by damage, and the user may not engage in combat while counting.
property_limitations: Only the most powerful Trollskin blessing affects a bound user.

property_description:
The user gains an 5 Bonus Armor (Ignoring their armor cap) and Bonus Health for each essence they are missing below the maximum of 5, as long as the blessing persists. 

Upcast: If the user has less than three essence remaining, they deal an additional two base weapon and ability damage.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user deals an additional 5 damage with all harmful abilities they use, and this damage is doubled if the ability uses the weapon damage of a weapon wielded in two hands. These benefits last as long as the blessing persists.  When this blessing is empowered by a Boon

Upcast: The user may benefit from temporary armor, but no other type of armor.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user gains the ability to call "Immobilize 5" on a successful weapon strike or packet throw three times each encounter. This benefit lasts as long as the blessing persists.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: If the user is able to touch another character with this blessing within five seconds of the start of an encounter, those characters become "Battle Buddies." Both may use a single non-passive ability of Tier 5 or lower during that encounter without expending it's normal usage, so long as that ability targets their Battle Buddy, or a creature their ally is engaged in combat with. Additionally, either Battle Buddy may complete a 10 second "aid" count to call "1 Heal" or "1 Harm" on their Battle Buddy.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user may double the effect of any beneficial Healing or Harm damage they take as long as the blessing persists. 

Upcast: The user may use shouts or spells of Tier 1.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user gains the ability to Touch an ally and, after completing a five second "Lay on Hands" count, they may call "Spell Life" or "Spell Death," depending on which is beneficial to the target. Each use of this ability consumes twenty five points from the user's Lay on Hands pool. This effect last as long as the blessing persists.

Upcast: The user gains an additional 25 points of Lay on Hands
property_limitations: Unique. User must have at least 25 points of Lay on Hands pool.

property_description:
The user may double the damage of their healing and harm effects when they are used to help an ally on touch casting. This benefit lasts as long as the blessing persists.  

Upcast: The user gains a "Resist Fear" they may use once per encounter.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
When using their shield, the user is immune to Fear, Immobilize, Push.

Upcast: The user may use Tier 1 offensive spells.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
If the user is living, they gain the Unliving condition, or if the user is Unliving, they lose the Unliving condition. Both statuses last as long as the blessing persists. 

Upcast: The user may, once per day, reverse the effect of any Healing or Harm effect that affects them.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user succeeds on all salvaging attempts on a dice roll of 3+ rather than 4+, as long as the blessing persists.

Upcast: The user may reroll one die every time they attempt to salvage an item.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user must choose one crafting profession in which they have at least one level. Whenever they craft using that profession, they require one less common component to perform the ritual per success the ritual requires, as long as the blessing persists. 

Upcast: When crafting with a tablet that requires at least two types of rare components, the user may provide any combination of those components (including all of one or the other) so long as the total number of rare components expended remains the same.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user must choose one crafting profession in which they have at least one level. Whenever they craft using that profession, they require two less common component to perform the ritual per success the ritual requires, as long as the blessing persists. 

Upcast: When crafting with a tablet that requires at least two types of rare components, the user may provide any combination of those components (including all of one or the other) so long as the total number of rare components expended remains the same.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description:
The user must choose one Pillar in which they have purchased the Mastery ability. If that Mastery Ability has an activated ability, they may use it one additional time per-day or per-encounter depending as long as the blessing persists.

Upcast: The user may instead select an ability that belongs to the unspecialized form of their mastered pillar, and they gain access to that ability.
property_limitations: Users may have multiple Mastery blessings so long as they are all for different Mastery Abilities.

property_description: The user chooses at the time of casting one damage type from Acid, Ice, Fire, or Shock. So long as the blessing persists the user may call this damage type instead of instead of Pierce. The user must call Damage at half their normal damage value.
property_limitations: Unique- A player may bind to only one "unique" Blessing

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +1 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 5 Temporary Health. The user may continue to use their unarmed strikes while subjected to the Wither condition.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +2 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 10 Temporary Health. The user may continue to use their unarmed strikes while subjected to the Wither condition.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to use unarmed strikes in normal combat as though they were one handed weapons, represented by using a Claw. These weapons gain an additional +3 bonus to their damage. Additionally, on a five second "Focusing" count, the user may grant themselves 15 Temporary Health. The user may continue to use their unarmed strikes while subjected to the Wither condition.
property_limitations: Only the strongest Blessing of the Fist increases damage.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, they take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 5 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than one. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool. Upon completion of the ten second count, the user does not take a Hemorrhage effect.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, They take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 15 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than three. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool. Upon completion of the ten second count, the user does not take a Hemorrhage effect.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.

property_description: The user gains the ability to perform a ten second "Sacrificing" count. At the conclusion of the count, They take a Hemorrhage 10, and take 25 damage directly to their health. They also restore the use of abilities who's combined Tier is no more than five. Refreshing a pool ability adds a single purchase's value of that pool. Upon completion of the ten second count, the user does not take a Hemorrhage effect.
property_limitations: Only strongest Blood Blessing may be used.
